headline: Cisco Deepens AI And 6G Push With Secure Australia Factory
summary: Cisco Systems (NasdaqGS:CSCO) has joined major global collaborations focused on open, AI native 6G wireless networks. The company is working with telecom and technology partners to shape standards and architectures for next generation connectivity. Cisco has launched Australia’s first Cisco Secure AI Factory with SharonAI Holdings and NVIDIA, focused on sovereign AI infrastructure and data security. Cisco Systems sits at the center of networking and security for large enterprises and...
